  "key_event": "Collapse of Fourth Republic under pressure from Algerian War.",
  "reasoning": "The Fourth Republic's chronic instability and inability to manage the Algerian War culminated in the 1958 crisis, where the army—acting as a powerful societal faction—forced the government's collapse, shattering state authority. Mobilized segments of society held immense power, while the state itself lost its monopoly on violence.",
